Author: Bronya Rand
Name: WukLamark
Description:
Allows players to create and manage persistent custom map markers across Eorzea. Whether it's a favorite GPose spot, a venue you want to revisit, or any interesting location, WukLamark lets you drop a map marker that appears seamlessly on both your main map and minimap.

Features:
- Customizable game icons and shapes for map markers (with optional icon tinting)
- Per-marker icon/shape sizes
- Custom map marker icons.
   > To add a custom icon, open the WukLamark window and click on 'Upload a new custom icon'.
- Per-marker icon/shape sizes.
- Organize map markers into groups (with map marker import/export).
- Cross-character sharing configurations.
- Crossworld markers.
- Add personal notes for context.
- Import/export one or multiple map markers with friends.
- Templates for quick map marker creation with predefined properties.
- Partial support for Native markers*
> * - Only applicable to the map, not the minimap.

Think of it as dropping a flag on the map but persistent.
Punchline: Create custom map markers on the map/minimap! Like <flag> but permanent.
